def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  n = landStartTime.length
  m = waterStartTime.length

  # Calculate all possible end times for land and water attractions
  land_end_times = []
  water_end_times = []

  # For each land attraction, calculate the end time if it is chosen first
  land_start_times = landStartTime
  land_durations = landDuration
  land_start_times.each_with_index do |start, i|
    land_end_times << [start + land_durations[i], i]
  end

  # For each water attraction, calculate the end time if it is chosen first
  water_start_times = waterStartTime
  water_durations = waterDuration
  water_start_times.each_with_index do |start, j|
    water_end_times << [start + water_durations[j], j]
  end

  # Sort the end times for land and water attractions
  land_end_times.sort!
  water_end_times.sort!

  # Calculate the minimum possible end time
  min_time = Float::INFINITY

  # Try all combinations of land and water attractions
  land_end_times.each do |land_end|
    land_time, land_idx = land_end
    # Find the earliest water attraction that can be used after the land attraction
    water_end_times.each do |water_end|
      water_time, water_idx = water_end
      # Calculate the start time for the water attraction
      water_start = [land_time, water_time].max
      # Calculate the end time for the water attraction
      water_end_time = water_start + water_durations[water_idx]
      # Update the minimum time
      min_time = [min_time, water_end_time].min
    end
  end

  # Try all combinations of water and land attractions
  water_end_times.each do |water_end|
    water_time, water_idx = water_end
    # Find the earliest land attraction that can be used after the water attraction
    land_end_times.each do |land_end|
      land_time, land_idx = land_end
      # Calculate the start time for the land attraction
      land_start = [water_time, land_time].max
      # Calculate the end time for the land attraction
      land_end_time = land_start + land_durations[land_idx]
      # Update the minimum time
      min_time = [min_time, land_end_time].min
    end
  end

  min_time
end
